hero.subtitle: AI financial advisor in your pocket. Every purchase in hours of your life. Kill impulse buying with the 7-day Wish Incubator.

lc.title: The Real Price Tag
lc.subtitle: Every price shown twice — in your currency and in hours of your life.

card.label: Today's purchase
card.detail: Almost 4 full work days. Still worth it?

s1.d: Salary + work hours → real hourly rate calculated automatically.

s2.d: Every transaction shows life-hours. Categories, charts, wishlist — everywhere.

s3.d: "40 hours of work" hits different from "$600". Decisions get easier.

ai.title: Your Personal Financial Advisor
ai.subtitle: Built-in AI that knows your spending habits, answers questions, and helps you make smarter decisions — 24/7.
ai.q1: I spent $400 on dining out this month. Is that too much?
ai.a1: That's 25 hours of your life on restaurants. Your dining budget was $250 — you're $150 over. Last month you spent $280. Trend is going up. Want tips to cut back?
ai.a2: 3 quick tips: 1) Meal prep on Sundays — saves ~$120/month. 2) Set a $60/week dining limit — I'll track it. 3) Use the Incubator for restaurant cravings — 70% of urges pass in 7 days.

f1.d: Ask anything about your finances. AI analyzes your real data and gives personalized advice.

f2.d: Say "Spent 15 bucks on coffee" — AI parses amount, category, and creates the transaction.

f3.d: Snap a photo of your receipt. AI reads items, amounts, dates — creates transactions automatically.

f4.d: AI spots patterns you miss: "You spend 40% more on weekends" or "Subscription costs doubled in 3 months."

inc.title: The Wish Incubator
inc.subtitle: 7-day cooling period. Most desires die before day 7.

s1.d: Add it with a reason: "Why do I need this?"

s2.d: Buy button locked. Countdown timer ticking.

s3.d: Decide on day 7. Buy or proudly reject.

r.d: You saved 40 hours of your life. Invested at 10% → $2,400 in 10 years.

an.title: Know Where Every Cent Goes
an.subtitle: Detailed breakdowns, trends, category insights — all visualized in beautiful charts.

f1.d: Beautiful donut charts per period — day, week, month, year. Tap any category for life-hours breakdown.

f2.d: Compare spending across months. See which categories grow, which shrink. Spot patterns before they become problems.

f3.d: Drill into any category. See top merchants, average transaction, life-hours cost, and month-over-month changes.

f4.d: Swipe through days, weeks, months, years. Full calendar date range picker for custom periods.

f5.d: Set limits per category with color-coded progress bars. Get warnings at 80%. See remaining budget in real-time while adding transactions.

f6.d: Export transactions to CSV with one tap. Full data portability — your data is yours.

feat.title: Everything You Need
feat.subtitle: A complete financial system, not just an expense tracker.

f1.d: Cash, bank, cards, investments, debts. All in one place with multi-currency support and auto-balance updates.

f2.d: 16 built-in categories with custom icons and colors. Create your own. Donut charts show spending in money and life-hours.

f3.d: Move money between accounts with auto-conversion. Cash to card, USD to EUR — all tracked instantly.

f4.d: Real-time rates for fiat, crypto, and precious metals. Convert anything instantly. Works offline with cached rates.

f5.d: Fingerprint, Face ID, or PIN code. Your financial data stays private — auto-locks after 30 seconds in background.

f6.d: Try the full app instantly — no sign-up needed. Explore all features with sample data before creating an account.

s1.d: Create an account or try demo mode. No credit card needed.

s2.d: Enter salary and work hours. Hourly rate calculated automatically.

s3.d: Add transactions manually, by voice, or scan receipts. Life-hours everywhere.

s4.d: Fewer impulse buys. More savings. AI-powered insights. Real freedom.

prem.title: Unlock Full Potential
prem.subtitle: Free is powerful. Premium makes it unstoppable.

cta.subtitle: Join thousands of people taking control of their finances.
